_meta.purpose: AI Agent handoff file — tracks exact build state so any agent can continue without re-reading the entire codebase

agile_planning.current_sprint: Sprint 23 ✅ DONE — Network Zone & Firewall Rule Management

tech_stack.frontend: React 18 + Vite + Ant Design + Zustand + TanStack Query

docker_commands.migrate: docker compose run --rm migrate sh -c 'npx prisma migrate deploy'
docker_commands.migrate_dev: docker compose run --rm migrate sh -c 'npx prisma migrate dev --name <name>'
docker_commands.seed_admin: docker compose run --rm migrate sh -c 'npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts'

guards.ModuleGuard: guards/module.guard.ts — checks ModuleConfig.status=ENABLED, use per route

interceptors.TransformInterceptor: interceptors/transform.interceptor.ts — wraps response in { data, message, meta }

filters.GlobalExceptionFilter: filters/http-exception.filter.ts — returns { error: { code, message, statusCode } }

dto.PaginationDto: dto/pagination.dto.ts — page, limit, sortBy, sortOrder, get skip()

common.note: TransformInterceptor + GlobalExceptionFilter registered globally in main.ts (Sprint 1). All responses now {data, message, meta?}.

endpoints: POST /api/v1/auth/register        — @Public, creates LOCAL account with VIEWER role
POST /api/v1/auth/logout          — authenticated, revokes all refresh tokens
POST /api/v1/auth/change-password — authenticated, changes own password + revokes tokens
auth.notes: JWT includes union of direct + group roles. bcrypt salt=12. access=15m, refresh=7d.

user.notes: All responses wrapped in {data, message} via TransformInterceptor

implemented: GET /api/v1/user-groups              — paginated list with search/status filter
user-group.notes: ModuleGuard removed — USER_MGMT key not in seed; user/group mgmt is always-on

module-config.notes: Dependency check on enable/disable. CORE modules cannot be toggled.

demo_data_seeded.servers: 8 (DEV×2, UAT×2, PROD×4 including LB and DR)
demo_data_seeded.applications: 4 (Core Banking, Payment, API Gateway, Admin Portal)

implemented: GET /api/v1/audit-logs/:id          — single entry detail with user info
GET /api/v1/servers               — list with filter (env, status, infra_type, site) + pagination
GET /api/v1/servers/:id           — detail with hardware_components, network_configs, app_deployments
GET /api/v1/servers/:id/applications — list all deployments (with app info) on this server
server.notes: ModuleGuard with SERVER_MGMT key. ChangeHistoryService auto-records all mutations.

implemented: GET /api/v1/hardware              — list with filter (server_id, type, search) + pagination
POST /api/v1/hardware             — create and attach to server, @Roles('ADMIN','OPERATOR')
hardware.notes: ModuleGuard with HARDWARE_MGMT key. detach = soft-delete (server_id NOT NULL in schema).

change-history.notes: Shared ChangeHistoryService — imported by ServerModule and HardwareModule. Auto-records all CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/ATTACH/DETACH actions into change_histories table.

implemented: GET /api/v1/network-configs              — list with filter (server_id, environment, ip, search)
network.notes: ModuleGuard with NETWORK_MGMT key. IP conflict: same private_ip + same environment. Unit tests written.

implemented: GET /api/v1/app-groups              — list with search filter + pagination
GET /api/v1/app-groups/:id          — detail with applications + system_software counts
GET /api/v1/applications/:id         — detail with group, active deployments, ports
application.notes: ModuleGuard SOFTWARE_MGMT. ChangeHistory for PATCH. Unit tests written.

implemented: POST /api/v1/deployments             — auto-creates DeploymentDoc records from active DocTypes
deployment.notes: Sprint 6: FileUploadService added (memoryStorage multer, MIME validate). File stored at uploads/deployments/{id}/preview|final/. Serve via streaming createReadStream.

implemented: GET /api/v1/ports/:id          — detail with app and deployment→server info
POST /api/v1/ports             — @Roles('ADMIN','OPERATOR'), conflict detection if deployment_id set
port.notes: ModuleGuard PORT_MGMT. Conflict: same server (via deployment) + same port_number + protocol → 409. Unit tests written.

implemented: GET /api/v1/connections              — list with filter (env, source_app_id, target_app_id, connection_type, search)
GET /api/v1/connections/:id          — detail with source_app + target_app info
GET /api/v1/applications/:id/dependencies — upstream + downstream with env filter
connection.notes: ModuleGuard CONNECTION_MGMT. Unit tests written in __tests__/connection.service.spec.ts.

implemented: GraphQL query: topology(environment) — returns servers (with deployments + networkConfigs) + connections
GraphQL query: appDependency(appId) — returns upstream + downstream ConnectionEdge[]
GraphQLModule registered in AppModule with ApolloDriver, autoSchemaFile → src/schema.gql, playground at /graphql
topology.notes: Code-first GraphQL with @ObjectType/@Field/@Query decorators. TopologyService injected by SnapshotModule.

implemented: POST /api/v1/import/preview — upload CSV/XLSX, validate, return preview with session_id (@Roles ADMIN/OPERATOR)
import.notes: Supports server, application, deployment entity types. CSV via csv-parse, Excel via dynamic import exceljs. Session TTL 10min.

implemented: GET /api/v1/alerts — list all active alerts (OS EOL, port conflicts, stopped deployments)
alert.notes: On-demand computation. No cron dependency needed.

new_endpoints: GET /api/v1/auth/ms365/callback — @Public, handle OAuth2 code, create/link user, redirect to FE
auth_sso.notes: MS365Strategy in strategies/oidc.strategy.ts. No passport-openidconnect needed — uses native fetch Node 18+. Config: MS365_TENANT_ID, MS365_CLIENT_ID, MS365_CLIENT_SECRET, MS365_REDIRECT_URI, FRONTEND_URL

implemented: GET /api/v1/changesets — list with filter (status, environment, created_by) + pagination
POST /api/v1/changesets/:id/preview — compute virtual topology + conflict detection (IP/Port/Circular)
changeset.notes: ModuleGuard CHANGESET. PreviewEngineService detects IP conflicts, Port conflicts, Circular dependencies. Apply runs prisma.$transaction() and auto-creates TopologySnapshot.

implemented: POST /api/v1/topology-snapshots — capture + persist topology payload (requires TOPOLOGY_2D module)
GET /api/v1/topology-snapshots — paginated list, filter by environment (payload excluded)
GET /api/v1/topology-snapshots/:id — full snapshot including payload JSON
snapshot.notes: Prisma migration 20260410000000_add_topology_snapshots adds topology_snapshots table. Unit tests written.

files.src/main.tsx: React root, QueryClientProvider, BrowserRouter, Ant Design ConfigProvider
files.src/App.tsx: Routing + ProtectedRoute (checks auth + system status → /setup if uninitialized)
files.src/api/client.ts: Axios instance, Bearer token injection, 401 → refresh token flow
files.src/stores/authStore.ts: Zustand persisted store: user, accessToken, refreshToken, isAuthenticated

files.src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: Ant Design Menu with nav links (dashboard, servers, apps, audit, admin)
files.src/components/layout/Header.tsx: Toggle sidebar + user dropdown with logout

auth/LoginPage.notes: Form with email/password + Microsoft 365 SSO button. Handles ?sso_error= query param.

auth/AuthCallbackPage.notes: Handles SSO callback: extracts tokens from URL, fetches /users/me, stores auth, redirects to /dashboard

setup/SetupPage.notes: 3-step wizard: Welcome → Config preview (modules + user groups + optional demo data toggle) → Done. Calls POST /system/initialize then optionally POST /system/seed-demo

dashboard/DashboardPage.notes: 4 static Statistic cards (all showing 0). Needs real data from APIs.

admin/UsersPage.notes: DataTable + Create + Edit + Role + Reset + LoginHistory

admin/ModulesPage.notes: Card layout CORE/EXTENDED + dependency check modal

admin/SystemConfigPage.notes: Log config UI (level, file, console toggles)

server/ServerListPage.notes: DataTable + env tabs (DEV/UAT/PROD) + filter by status/search + create/edit/delete

server/ServerDetailPage.notes: 5 tabs: Info / Hardware (inline CRUD+detach) / Network (inline CRUD+conflict alert) / Apps / History (ChangeHistoryTimeline)

application/AppListPage.notes: List+filter by group/status + Tabs: Apps/Groups. Integrated AppGroupList.

application/SystemSoftware.notes: CRUD with EOL date warning, type filter.

deployment/DeploymentDetail.notes: Tabs: Info (progress stats)/Docs (DocUploadCard)/Ports. File upload+waive workflow.

audit/AuditLogPage.notes: DataTable + filter (action/resource/time) + detail modal (old/new diff) + CSV export button

topology/TopologyPage.notes: React Flow 2D canvas. Engines: ReactFlow / vis-network / Mermaid. Layout algorithms: Dagre + ELK (layered/force/tree/radial). Direction: TB/BT/LR/RL. Auto-arrange on algorithm/direction change. 8-direction collision avoidance on drag. Edge styles: bezier/step. Connection mode (draw edge to create). Draggable protocol labels. Node visibility filter (modal) with cascade: group→server→app. Connection health drawer: analyzeTopologyHealth() — circular dep, dead connection, cross-env, SPoF, orphaned app; focus node on click. Export PNG/SVG/JSON/Mermaid. Save snapshot + SnapshotBrowser. Fullscreen. Mermaid preview: auto-fit + CSS zoom (25–400%).

infra-system/InfraSystemPage.notes: DataTable + filter by Environment/Site. Bulk delete. CSV Import Modal w/ Context Overrides. Access Management Modal.

changeset/ChangeSetListPage.notes: DataTable + filter (status/env) + Create modal. Navigate to detail on click.

changeset/ChangeSetDetailPage.notes: Descriptions metadata + ChangeItemDiff table (old/new side-by-side) + Preview/Apply/Discard actions.

changeset/ChangeSetPreviewPage.notes: Virtual topology cards color-coded (NEW=green, MODIFIED=yellow, DELETED=red). Conflict warning panel. Apply button disabled if fatal conflicts.

app-import/AppImportPage.notes: Unified tabbed import page (S18-11). Consolidates 3 separate upload flows into 1 page with tabs: App / Deployment / Connection. State managed via URL param ?tab=. Backward compat: /app-upload → /app-import?tab=app, /deployment-upload → /app-import?tab=deployment, /connection-upload → /app-import?tab=connection.

shared_components.FilterBar: NOT_STARTED — shared filter panel component (inline filters used instead per page)

known_issues.description: IDE shows 'Cannot find module' errors because node_modules not installed locally (only inside Docker). This does NOT affect runtime.
known_issues.fix: Run npm install at repo root on dev machine, or ignore IDE errors.

known_issues.description: An external linter/AI tool auto-rewrites backend files when they are opened in IDE, replacing Prisma imports with mock types. This breaks the build.
known_issues.fix: After any session, verify prisma.service.ts extends PrismaClient (not MockPrismaClient). Run docker compose up backend --build to confirm no ReferenceError at startup.

known_issues.description: Pre-existing TS errors in unrelated files (Topology3DView, CreateConnectionModal, changeset pages). Do not introduce new errors when editing these files.
known_issues.fix: Address separately per file when touching those modules.

known_issues.description: Docker pgdata volume password mismatch: if start.sh -b fails with 'Database authentication failed', the volume was init'd with a different password than 'postgres'.
known_issues.fix: Run: docker exec systemmanager-db-1 psql -U postgres -c "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'postgres';" — fixes without data loss.

architecture_decisions: Module guards (ModuleGuard) must be applied PER ROUTE using @UseGuards(ModuleGuard) + @RequireModule('KEY') — not global. Core always-on modules (user, auth, audit) do NOT use ModuleGuard.
ALL responses now wrapped: {data, message} for single, {data, meta} for list — TransformInterceptor registered globally in main.ts since Sprint 1.
Soft delete pattern: always set deleted_at, never hard delete. Queries filter deleted_at: null.
Roles decorator accepts string literals ('ADMIN', 'OPERATOR', 'VIEWER') — not Prisma enum objects
Demo data seeding is idempotent: seed-demo throws 409 if servers already exist
Frontend /setup auto-redirects ADMIN users only when system status initialized=false
